sacco

Class StandingMario

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.StandingMario
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SelfPainter

    public class StandingMario
extends java.lang.Object
implements SelfPainter

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      StandingMario()
      Constructs a new StandingMario at 0,0 with a scale of 1
      StandingMario(int x, int y, double scale)
      Constructs a new StandingMario object with the given x,y,and scale

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      paints Mario onto the given PaintBrush object according to the instance fields

      Sets the scale of the StandingMario

      Sets the x of the StandingMario

    • Constructor Detail

      • StandingMario

        public StandingMario(int x,
             int y,
             double scale)
        Constructs a new StandingMario object with the given x,y,and scale
        Parameters:
        x - The x location
        y - The y location
        scale - The scale that you want this StandingMario to have

      • StandingMario

        public StandingMario()
        Constructs a new StandingMario at 0,0 with a scale of 1

      • paintSelf

        public void paintSelf(Canvas brush)
        paints Mario onto the given PaintBrush object according to the instance fields

        paintSelf in interface SelfPainter

      • setScale

        public void setScale(double scale)
        Sets the scale of the StandingMario
        Parameters:
        scale - How many times larger this StandingMario will be
